meta.content: Sandeep Hakki — Solution Architect, Azure Cloud Expert, Technical Blogger from Bangalore, India.
meta.name: description

meta.content: Sandeep Hakki, Solution Architect, Azure, Cloud, Data Engineering, .NET, Technical Blog, hakki.in
meta.name: keywords

div.p: Technical Architect at Nokia India & Technical Blogger

I’m Sandeep Hakki — a Solution Architect and IT professional with 14+ years of experience across the Microsoft technology stack, specialising in Azure cloud architecture, AI/ML solutioning, and data integration using modern ETL platforms.
I design and deliver scalable, cloud-native solutions that drive real business impact — blending technical depth with project leadership and client engagement.
I’ve led end-to-end digital transformation projects, managed RFP responses, and architected data pipelines and AI workloads using Azure Data Factory, Azure Data Lake, Databricks, SSIS, and Talend.

I’m also a published author on cloud computing and currently exploring a multi-cloud integration concept called “One Cloud” to help reduce vendor dependency. Actively participating in Microsoft events for the last 8 years and contributing to the community.

div.span: Telecom, Healthcare, Retail, Online Learning, Banking, IoT, Home Automation
Azure PaaS · ADF · Databricks · SSIS · Talend · .NET · AI/ML · DevOps

ul.li: Designed end-to-end application architecture using Azure PaaS services, focusing on scalability and cost-efficiency.
Built and maintained Azure CI/CD pipelines across all environments using Azure DevOps.
Planned and executed production deployment strategies with minimal downtime.
Resolved post-deployment Azure security issues including configuration hardening and access policies.
Managed critical Azure resources — SSL certificates, App Registrations, Key Vault secrets.
Conducted training workshops on Azure services and DevOps best practices.
Led process automation initiative replacing a 4-year manual Excel analytics workflow.
Used Talend ETL and Python scripting to automate data extraction and reporting.
Implemented ML models to automate RFP proposal categorisation.
Developed ASP.NET MVC applications with Entity Framework using Agile SCRUM.
Part of architecting the application — developed HLD, LLD, unit test cases.
Migrated legacy .NET applications to latest frameworks without affecting production.
Trained 10-member team on MVC; participated in technical interview panels.

div.h3: Software Developer at Trigent Software Inc

ul.li: Built School Management System on ASP.NET MVC 5, EF6, Code First, Bootstrap.
Developed Online Reading Program on ASP.NET, C#, ADO.NET, SQL, SSRS, and DNN.

div.h3: Software Developer at EF Education First
div.p: In-house web development on ASP.NET MVC, Entity Framework, and SiteCore CMS.

ul.li: Built end-to-end reference POC/Framework for clients with thorough functional and non-functional testing.
Worked on Windows 8 Metro applications and multi-tier .NET systems.
Built SQL BI reports (SSRS, SSIS) hosted in IIS.

div.p: Delivered a webinar to BLDE Engineering College students on cloud technology.
Delivered a session on Azure cloud to an audience of engineers and developers.
B.L.D.E.A’s V.P. Dr. P.G. Halakatti College of Engineering & Technology, Bijapur, Karnataka, India.

div.div: Sorry, the page you were looking for doesn’t exist.

div.p:
Solution Architect · Azure Cloud Expert · Technical Blogger.
Writing about the Microsoft stack, cloud architecture, and everything in between.

div.div: © · Built with care by Sandeep Hakki
